checks.name: view_presentation_safety
checks.description: viewPresentation only if: (principal in resource.viewers) OR (resource.owner == principal) OR (principal in resource.editors). All paths blocked for non-internal outside campaign window.

checks.name: remove_self_presentation_safety
checks.description: removeSelfAccessFromPresentation only if viewer or editor or owner, blocked for non-internal outside campaign window.

checks.name: duplicate_presentation_safety
checks.description: duplicatePresentation only if (internal + viewer) or owner or editor, blocked for non-internal outside campaign window.

checks.name: edit_presentation_safety
checks.description: editPresentation only if owner or editor, blocked for non-internal outside campaign window.

checks.name: grant_view_presentation_safety
checks.description: grantViewAccessToPresentation only if owner or editor, subject to customer sharing restriction and campaign window.

checks.name: grant_edit_presentation_safety
checks.description: grantEditAccessToPresentation only if owner or editor, target must be internal, subject to campaign window.

checks.name: view_template_safety
checks.description: viewTemplate only if (in viewerMarkets) or (internal + in viewers) or (owner or editor or in editorMarkets).

checks.name: duplicate_template_safety
checks.description: duplicateTemplate only if (in viewerMarkets) or (internal + in viewers) or (owner or editor or in editorMarkets).

checks.name: remove_self_template_safety
checks.description: removeSelfAccessFromTemplate only if (internal + in viewers) or (owner or editor or in editorMarkets).

checks.name: edit_template_safety
checks.description: editTemplate only if owner or editor or in editorMarkets.

checks.name: remove_others_template_safety
checks.description: removeOthersAccessToTemplate only if owner or editor or in editorMarkets.

checks.name: grant_view_template_safety
checks.description: grantViewAccessToTemplate only if owner or editor or in editorMarkets, subject to customer sharing restriction on targetUser.

checks.name: grant_edit_template_safety
checks.description: grantEditAccessToTemplate only if owner or editor or in editorMarkets, targetUser must be internal if present.

checks.name: owner_edit_presentation_floor
checks.description: Owner of a presentation MUST be able to editPresentation when internal (exempt from campaign window).

checks.name: external_viewer_view_floor
checks.description: A non-internal viewer MUST be able to viewPresentation when inside campaign window.

checks.name: internal_viewer_duplicate_floor
checks.description: Internal viewers MUST be able to duplicatePresentation (exempt from campaign window).

checks.name: market_viewer_template_floor
checks.description: Users in viewerMarkets MUST be able to viewTemplate.

checks.name: template_owner_edit_floor
checks.description: Template owner MUST be able to editTemplate.

checks.name: liveness_viewPresentation
checks.description: viewPresentation policy is not trivially deny-all.

checks.name: liveness_editPresentation
checks.description: editPresentation policy is not trivially deny-all.

checks.name: liveness_grantViewPresentation
checks.description: grantViewAccessToPresentation policy is not trivially deny-all.

checks.name: liveness_grantEditPresentation
checks.description: grantEditAccessToPresentation policy is not trivially deny-all.

checks.name: liveness_viewTemplate
checks.description: viewTemplate policy is not trivially deny-all.

checks.name: liveness_editTemplate
checks.description: editTemplate policy is not trivially deny-all.

checks.name: liveness_grantViewTemplate
checks.description: grantViewAccessToTemplate policy is not trivially deny-all.

checks.name: liveness_grantEditTemplate
checks.description: grantEditAccessToTemplate policy is not trivially deny-all.

results.description: viewPresentation only if: (principal in resource.viewers) OR (resource.owner == principal) OR (principal in resource.editors). All paths blocked for non-internal outside campaign window.
removeSelfAccessFromPresentation only if viewer or editor or owner, blocked for non-internal outside campaign window.
duplicatePresentation only if (internal + viewer) or owner or editor, blocked for non-internal outside campaign window.
editPresentation only if owner or editor, blocked for non-internal outside campaign window.
grantViewAccessToPresentation only if owner or editor, subject to customer sharing restriction and campaign window.
grantEditAccessToPresentation only if owner or editor, target must be internal, subject to campaign window.
viewTemplate only if (in viewerMarkets) or (internal + in viewers) or (owner or editor or in editorMarkets).
duplicateTemplate only if (in viewerMarkets) or (internal + in viewers) or (owner or editor or in editorMarkets).
removeSelfAccessFromTemplate only if (internal + in viewers) or (owner or editor or in editorMarkets).
editTemplate only if owner or editor or in editorMarkets.
removeOthersAccessToTemplate only if owner or editor or in editorMarkets.
grantViewAccessToTemplate only if owner or editor or in editorMarkets, subject to customer sharing restriction on targetUser.
grantEditAccessToTemplate only if owner or editor or in editorMarkets, targetUser must be internal if present.
Owner of a presentation MUST be able to editPresentation when internal (exempt from campaign window).
A non-internal viewer MUST be able to viewPresentation when inside campaign window.
Internal viewers MUST be able to duplicatePresentation (exempt from campaign window).
Users in viewerMarkets MUST be able to viewTemplate.
Template owner MUST be able to editTemplate.
viewPresentation policy is not trivially deny-all.
editPresentation policy is not trivially deny-all.
grantViewAccessToPresentation policy is not trivially deny-all.
grantEditAccessToPresentation policy is not trivially deny-all.
viewTemplate policy is not trivially deny-all.
editTemplate policy is not trivially deny-all.
grantViewAccessToTemplate policy is not trivially deny-all.
grantEditAccessToTemplate policy is not trivially deny-all.
